title: BEM-626 evidence canon

"""
sep='\n'
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

canon=protocols/'ROLE_EXECUTION_EVIDENCE_CANON.md'
canon.write_text('# BEM-626 | Role Execution Evidence Canon'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:25 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Зачем'+sep+sep+'Отчёты должны отличать file-based artifact от реального выполнения роли провайдером.'+sep+sep+'## Типы выполнения'+sep+sep+'### 1. artifact_only'+sep+'Роль представлена файлом/JSON в inbox/outbox. Это доказывает маршрутизацию, но не доказывает live LLM execution.'+sep+sep+'### 2. gpt_reserve_execution'+sep+'Роль выполнена GPT reserve через текущий write-канал. Должны быть: task id, commit, proof file, report.'+sep+sep+'### 3. claude_primary_execution'+sep+'Роль выполнена Claude Code primary. Должны быть: Claude-authored artifact, provider gate result, proof file, commit/run evidence.'+sep+sep+'### 4. codex_direct_execution'+sep+'Роль выполнена Codex/direct repo write внутри внутреннего контура. Должны быть: adapter name, commit, proof file. Deno не считается внутренним executor, если он использовался только как транспорт внешнего GPT.'+sep+sep+'## Обязательные поля отчёта'+sep+'- role'+sep+'- expected_actor'+sep+'- actual_actor'+sep+'- execution_type'+sep+'- adapter'+sep+'- provider_checked'+sep+'- selected_provider'+sep+'- reserve_used'+sep+'- proof_file'+sep+'- commit_sha'+sep+'- blocker'+sep+sep+'## Запрет'+sep+'Нельзя писать PASS по Claude primary только потому, что создан файл для Claude или есть mailbox-сообщение.'+sep)

matrix={
 'schema_version':'role_execution_evidence_matrix.v1',
 'bem':'BEM-626',
 'roles':[
   {'role':'Curator','expected_actor':'GPT','allowed_execution_types':['gpt_reserve_execution','artifact_only_for_routing'],'internal_bus':'governance/curator/inbox'},
   {'role':'Registrar/Role Orchestrator','expected_actor':'system/router','allowed_execution_types':['artifact_only_for_routing','codex_direct_execution'],'internal_bus':'governance/role_orchestrator/inbox'},
   {'role':'Analyst','expected_actor':'GPT','allowed_execution_types':['gpt_reserve_execution'],'internal_bus':'governance/internal_contour/analyst/plans'},
   {'role':'Internal Auditor','expected_actor':'Claude Code primary or GPT reserve','allowed_execution_types':['claude_primary_execution','gpt_reserve_execution'],'internal_bus':'governance/internal_contour/auditor/inbox'},
   {'role':'External Auditor','expected_actor':'Claude external auditor','allowed_execution_types':['claude_primary_execution','artifact_only_for_sync'],'mailbox':'governance/audit_mailbox'},
   {'role':'Executor','expected_actor':'Claude Code primary, Codex direct, or GPT reserve','allowed_execution_types':['claude_primary_execution','codex_direct_execution','gpt_reserve_execution'],'internal_bus':'governance/internal_contour/executor/inbox'}
 ],
 'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:25 (UTC+3)',
 'blocker':None
}
state_file=state_dir/'bem626_role_execution_evidence_matrix.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(matrix,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

report=reports/'bem626_role_execution_evidence_canon.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-626 | Role Execution Evidence Canon | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:25 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Created evidence canon to distinguish routing artifacts from live provider role execution.'+sep+sep+'## Key rule'+sep+'Claude primary requires Claude-authored runtime artifact. Mailbox file alone is not proof of Claude execution.'+sep+sep+'## Files'+sep+'- '+str(canon)+sep+'- '+str(state_file)+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem626_role_execution_evidence_canon','cycle_id':'bem626-role-execution-evidence-canon','source':'gpt_architect','status':'completed','canon':str(canon),'matrix':str(state_file),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:25 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        contour_state={}
contour_state['bem626_role_execution_evidence_canon']={'status':'completed','canon':str(canon),'matrix':str(state_file),'blocker':None}
contour_state['role_execution_evidence_canon']='active'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 07:25 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem626_role_execution_evidence_canon.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-626 PASS: role execution evidence canon created.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(canon),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created role execution evidence canon distinguishing artifacts from live provider execution')
